CustomField.description: Minimum number of times the trigger and suggestion must occur together before a rule is considered.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Filters out “one‑off” or rare coincidences. If set to 6, a pair must co‑occur at least 6 times to be eligible. Example: If Airport A → Hotel B co‑occurs 5 times, it’s ignored when MIN_SUPPORT = 6.
CustomField.label: Minimum support
